title: Senior Teacher - BITS Pilani Digital Technologies - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - BITS Pilani Digital Technologies - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
BITS Pilani Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BITS Pilani Digital Technologies:
BITS Pilani Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BITS Pilani Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
